'''Mar'ek''' was an [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]] under the command of [[Senior Jedi General]] [[Darrus Jeht/Legends|Darrus Jeht]].

==Biography==
Mar'ek was told to execute [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] while they were in the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]]. He tried to kill Darrus as he exited a [[Turbolift/Legends|turbolift]], but Jeht was expecting it. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] killed his bodyguard and then stabbed his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] through Mar'ek's face.

{{Char-stub}}
